_notes.purpose: Example brute.json. brute.json controls random perturbation search settings for one pipeline config.
_notes.pipeline_config: Path to pipeline.json. Batch mode may override this per image/prompt combo.
_notes.output_dir: Folder where successful, unsuccessful, failures, and brute_report.json are written.
_notes.trials: Number of random attempts for this one image/prompt combo.
_notes.success_threshold: A completed run is successful when average DeepFace match_percent is <= this value.
_notes.seed: Seed for random parameter sampling. Also used as fixed attempt seed when randomize_attempt_seed is false.
_notes.randomize_attempt_seed: true picks random attempt seeds from attempt_seed_range. Batch mode makes these unique across the whole batch.
_notes.attempt_seed_range: Inclusive min/max range used for random attempt seeds.
_notes.resume: true safely continues an interrupted brute run. Completed run folders are skipped; incomplete run folders are moved aside before retrying that run number.
_notes.save_unsuccessful: For actual failures only: false trims generated image files and keeps report.json plus sampled_config.json. Threshold failures are always saved under unsuccessful.
_notes.deepface_worker: Persistent DeepFace worker settings. Enabled keeps one subprocess warm across attempts so model weights are not reloaded every run. max_attempts_per_worker recycles the worker periodically to reduce native-library crash risk.
_notes.ranges: Per-perturbation parameter ranges. Only enabled perturbations from pipeline.json are sampled.
